title: Non-text Content
description: All non-text content must have a text alternative
fix_suggestion: Add a descriptive alt attribute to every img tag

title: Info and Relationships
description: Information and structure must be conveyed through markup
fix_suggestion: Add a label element with a for attribute matching the input id

title: Use of Color
description: Color must not be the only means of conveying information
logic: color should not be the only means of conveying information
fix_suggestion: Use text labels or patterns alongside color to convey meaning

title: Contrast (Minimum)
description: Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1
logic: text color contrast ratio must be at least 4.5:1
fix_suggestion: Increase the contrast between text color and background color

title: Contrast (Enhanced)
description: Text must have a contrast ratio of at least 7:1
logic: text color contrast ratio must be at least 7:1
fix_suggestion: Increase the contrast between text color and background color to at least 7:1

title: Keyboard
description: All functionality must be available via keyboard
logic: all interactive elements must be keyboard accessible
fix_suggestion: Ensure all interactive elements can be reached and activated using only the keyboard

title: Keyboard (No Exception)
description: All functionality must be available via keyboard with no exceptions
logic: all functionality must be operable via keyboard without exception
fix_suggestion: Remove any functionality that requires a specific device path and cannot be done via keyboard

title: Bypass Blocks
description: A mechanism must be available to bypass blocks of content
logic: page must have a skip navigation link
fix_suggestion: Add a skip to main content link at the top of the page

title: Page Titled
description: Web pages must have titles that describe topic or purpose
logic: page must have a non-empty title tag
fix_suggestion: Add a descriptive title element inside the head tag

title: Focus Order
description: Focusable components must receive focus in an order that preserves meaning
logic: focus order must be logical and meaningful
fix_suggestion: Ensure the DOM order matches the visual order so tab focus is logical

title: Link Purpose (In Context)
description: The purpose of each link must be determinable from the link text
logic: links must not use vague text like click here or read more
fix_suggestion: Replace vague link text with descriptive text that explains the link destination

title: Headings and Labels
description: Headings and labels must describe topic or purpose
logic: heading hierarchy must be logical and not skip levels
fix_suggestion: Use headings in order h1 h2 h3 without skipping levels

title: Language of Page
description: The default human language of each page must be programmatically determined
logic: html tag must have lang attribute
fix_suggestion: Add a lang attribute to the html tag with the correct language code

title: Language of Parts
description: The human language of each passage must be programmatically determined
logic: elements with different language content must have lang attribute
fix_suggestion: Add lang attribute to elements that contain content in a different language

title: Error Identification
description: If an input error is detected it must be identified and described to the user
logic: form errors must be clearly identified and described
fix_suggestion: Display clear error messages that identify the field and describe the problem

title: Labels or Instructions
description: Labels or instructions must be provided when content requires user input
logic: all form inputs must have visible labels or instructions
fix_suggestion: Add visible label elements or placeholder instructions to all form inputs

title: Parsing
description: HTML must have complete start and end tags and no duplicate attributes
logic: html must be well formed with no parsing errors
fix_suggestion: Fix HTML markup errors using a validator like the W3C validator

title: Name Role Value
description: All UI components must have name role and value that can be determined programmatically
logic: interactive elements must have accessible name and role
fix_suggestion: Add aria-label or aria-labelledby to interactive elements that lack visible text labels
